Priority: HIGH
Type: feature

# Task
- Description of the task to be executed.

# DNA
- Final merged system details.

# Roadmap
- Future plans and milestones.

# CHANGELOG
- History of changes made.

# README
- Project description and setup instructions.

# KNOWLEDGE_BASE
- AI memory storage.

# SOURCE MAP
- Tracks changes and origins of key files.
- Example:
  ## auth/login.js
  - Source: original repo
  - Modified: YES
  - Changes: JWT → Token system v2

VERSION: 1.4.2
STATUS: stable
LAST_UPDATED: 2026-05-04

name: Versioning

on:
  push:
    paths:
      - docs/VERSION.md

jobs:
  versioning:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Read VERSION.md
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(cat docs/VERSION.md | grep VERSION | cut -d ' ' -f 2)
          echo "::set-output name=version::$VERSION"
      - name: Auto-increment version
        run: |
          # Logic for version bump goes here.

name: Tagging

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  tagging:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Create Git Tag
        run: |
          git tag v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          git push origin v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
